summary: Final pre-redeploy regression for WelcomeLetter + collapsed ChairExpansionPlan + Genesis-aligned legacy chair pricing + MissionBriefing 'What's Next' refresh. 4/4 backend tests pass (health probes, /api/chairs/phase Genesis $10/3×/50K, /api/chairs/expansion-plan still 10 tiers $10..$55). 50/50 frontend Playwright assertions pass — section order Hero→MissionBriefing→WelcomeLetter→ChairExpansionPlan→TokenRoadmap→LatestAdditions verified, 5 Beat blocks present, ceiling reveal toggles correctly with $55/5.5×/chair #500,000 text, founders-info-box collapses by default and reveals 9 tiers (chair-tier-10 absent, apex-teaser present), chair-stat-multiplier shows '3×' / 'locked at buy time', mission-briefing-roadmap shows 'What's Next' with Squads Multi-Sig Treasury (Live Now) / $VIBEZ TGE (Coming Soon) / Reserve Vault Unlock (Post-Milestone) and old Q3/Q4-2026/2027 entries fully removed. TokenRoadmap retains 9 milestones; Phantom Connect button intact. Safe to redeploy.
critical_code_review_comments: WelcomeLetter ceiling block uses native conditional render gated by showCeiling state — exit animation isn't wrapped in AnimatePresence so the close transition is instant (initial reveal still animates via motion.div). Functional but not parallel with ChairExpansionPlan AnimatePresence pattern. Cosmetic only.

ChairExpansionPlan filters tier 10 client-side (visibleTiers = plan.tiers.filter(t => t.order < 10)). The /api/chairs/expansion-plan endpoint still returns the Apex tier so admin-side / DevTools inspection can see it — matches the user's intent that Apex is hidden in public UI but available via API. No code change needed; just a note.

Public preview URL routes /health to the React dev server (returns 200 + index.html), not to backend port 8001. The backend /health returns proper {status:ok} on internal :8001 (verified). For deploy probe, ingress in production environment should route /health directly to backend — confirm that ingress rule, otherwise probe will see HTML payload and possibly fail strict JSON checks.

Console error 'TypeError: e is not a function' at minified bundle.js still present (pre-existing across multiple prior iterations — perf_alert_qr_sdk, chair_expansion_plan_redeploy). Not caused by this change; Sentry/3rd-party init swallowed in la.initialize. Should be tracked separately.
test_credentials: Admin: GlobalVibez_Founder_2025! / 000000 (not exercised this run — admin surface untouched by this change; verified-by-prior-iteration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ladder visibility split: Apex/Phase X/$55 is filtered out of public ChairExpansionPlan UI (chair-tier-10 selector returns null), but /api/chairs/expansion-plan still serves all 10 tiers — Playwright tests must check for chair-tier-1..9 only and use apex-teaser to validate the hidden-by-design intent. Legacy /api/chairs/phase now returns Genesis $10 / 50K cap / weight 3.0 (was $5 / 20K / unspecified) — any older test asserting price_usd==5 will now fail and is correct to update. WelcomeLetter ceiling block toggles via state (no AnimatePresence on exit); after a click, wait ~500ms before re-querying. Public preview /health is intercepted by frontend; check internal http://localhost:8001/health for actual backend probe response. Pre-existing minified bundle TypeError unrelated to this change.

verified_endpoints_status.GET /api/chairs/phase: 200 — phase=Genesis, price_usd=10.0, weight=3.0, in_phase_capacity=50000, tagline references '3× earn rate'
verified_endpoints_status.GET /api/chairs/expansion-plan: 200 — 10 tiers, prices $10..$55 in $5 steps, Apex tier (order=10) present in API
